creator: laurent@daverio.net
text:
(In reply to Manuel Steudtner from comment #8)

I have stopped running -STABLE versions years ago, only -RELEASE and binary updates for me now, on several servers (between 5 and 10). Moreover, following a disk crash last March, I reinstalled a fresh OS (and restored my data) on the server hosting my Gitlab. I don't have a poudriere jail, just a plain 13.2-RELEASE environment, and the module doesn't build for me :(

Laurent.
